title: Comment To Messenger Handoff
description: Channel v1 handoff contract for moving a public Facebook comment context into Messenger/private channel.
$comment: Sources: PACK-06 and TECH-06 private handoff model. If private handoff fails, the system must not collect private info in public or claim handoff success.

private_handoff_status.description: Private handoff state. Prefer PRIVATE_HANDOFF_* values in enums/channel/handoff-status.yaml.

public_ack_allowed.description: Whether a safe public acknowledgement is allowed.

context_preserved.description: Whether the original public context was preserved in the private handoff.
